title: Foo Bar Full Pipeline Debug
description: Diagnose and fix a broken end-to-end pipeline: Postgres CDC to Redpanda to ClickHouse. Multiple failure points including misconfigured connector, wrong topic, and missing ClickHouse table.

tasks.description: Find and fix all pipeline failures so data flows Postgres -> Redpanda -> ClickHouse

infrastructure.description: Postgres with app.events. Redpanda with wrong topic name. Broken CDC config. ClickHouse missing target table.
